name: Healthy Telugu Week
angle: High-protein, light, fitness-friendly home cooking: minimal oil, no deep frying, whole grains, millets and dals. Frame shots to show what makes the dish nutritious — protein close-ups (dals, sprouts, fish, egg), steam instead of oil sheen, fresh greens — while staying true to how the dish is really made. Never show deep frying or heavy ghee pours.
